name: ANCHOR: Automated Alignment Auditing for CLI Agents on Real-World Harm

description: arXiv:2607.10455v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Autonomous CLI agents can now execute hundreds of actions across multi-hour sessions: writing code, executing shell commands, browsing the web, and managing cloud infrastructure, all with minimal human oversight. Does greater autonomy invite greater risk? We introduce ANCHOR, an automated auditing framework that stress-tests CLI agents on illegal...
author: Kefan Song, Yanjun Qi
